title: Ralph-loop 2.0? The real autonomous coder is coming...
summary: AI Jason discusses the /goal feature and related autonomous coding capabilities, comparing prospects to Ralph-loop 2.0. The video covers goal-setting in coding frameworks, mission exploration for long-horizon tasks, and tools like Crewlet and Superdesign that enable autonomous code generation.
